properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many souls have tested Him throughout the course of time. So many still reach out to Him with broken hearts and minds. And everyone of them will say, With no exception that they find Jesus never fails

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Even in the days of old, He brought His people through. And then He came to show His love and died for me and you. Then He rose again to prove, That every story has been true Jesus never fails

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus never fails. Jesus never fails. You might as well get thee Behind me, Satan You cannot prevail, Because Jesus never fails.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes this world brings trouble I find so hard to bear. I know I could not make it without Jesus being there. It's so encouraging to know, However deep we're in despair Jesus never fails.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So what can I do to prove to you, Tell me how can you deny? No untold facts, no mysteries, It's all so cut and dried. On the witness stand of your life, I'll be the first to testify Jesus never fails!
